# HBCU Yard Pass — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> HBCU Yard Pass is a digital membership platform that fuses HBCU culture, community pride, and financial empowerment into one powerful savings experience. It connects the entire HBCU ecosystem — students, alumni, faculty, Greek organizations, and families — to tens of thousands of participating merchants nationwide. Beyond savings, it serves as a community investment tool that supports HBCU institutions, scholarships, and cultural initiatives. The brand carries a strong sense of legacy, school pride, and economic empowerment, celebrating HBCU traditions like Homecoming, football classics, and step shows while delivering real everyday value.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
HBCU Yard Pass connects students, alumni, and families to thousands of retail savings nationwide. Fuse culture, pride, and financial empowerment — join today!

### Features
https://example.com/features
Explore powerful retail discounts, low cost flights, and exclusive member perks built for the entire HBCU ecosystem. Your savings journey starts right here — discover every feature!

### About
https://example.com/about
HBCU Yard Pass was born from culture, Homecoming energy, and a mission to drive economic empowerment across every HBCU campus and community nationwide. Learn our story!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about membership, partnerships, or retail opportunities? Reach our team today — whether you&#39;re navigating southwest cancelled flights or campus savings, we&#39;re here for you.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About HBCU Yard Pass
HBCU Yard Pass is a digital membership platform that fuses HBCU culture, community pride, and financial empowerment into one powerful savings experience. It connects the entire HBCU ecosystem — students, alumni, faculty, Greek organizations, and families — to tens of thousands of participating merchants nationwide. Beyond savings, it serves as a community investment tool that supports HBCU institutions, scholarships, and cultural initiatives. The brand carries a strong sense of legacy, school pride, and economic empowerment, celebrating HBCU traditions like Homecoming, football classics, and step shows while delivering real everyday value.

## Services/Products
- Nationwide discount network (restaurants, retail, hotels, flights, entertainment, automotive, theme parks, wireless & tech)
- Interactive web-based savings portal
- Mobile-friendly membership access
- Community investment and HBCU institutional support
- Exclusive savings for the entire HBCU community

## Target Audience
- HBCU students, alumni, faculty, staff, Greek organizations, families, supporters, community leaders, and corporate partners
- HBCU Students & Alumni
- HBCU Faculty & Staff
- HBCU Greek Organizations

## Industry
Membership Benefits & Lifestyle Savings

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
